steps.title: Recognize that purchase time is when x equals 0
steps.content: The equation $y = 8,400(0.88)^x$ models the car's value in dollars, where $x$ is the number of years after purchase. The phrase at the time it was purchased means we need the value when $x = 0$ (no time has elapsed).

steps.title: Substitute and evaluate
steps.content:
Substitute $x = 0$ into the equation:
$$y = 8,400(0.88)^0$$
Any non-zero number to the power of 0 equals 1, so $(0.88)^0 = 1$:
$$y = 8,400 \cdot 1 = 8,400$$
That confirms C is correct.
